logs.name: fermented-bookcase
logs.text: There is gas in Israel and some other natural resources. The most valuable part is Jerusalem though.

logs.name: mint-chateau
logs.text:
Which still doesn't say *anything* about the resources about the areas current being contested.

Just because Vermont is in the North East doesn't mean it has the same resources as New York City.

logs.name: furious-merlot
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? You think you're so smart with your 'just because' statements? Newsflash: the whole point of this conversation is to discuss the resources in the disputed areas, not just Vermont and New York City. Can we please stay on topic? @fermented-bookcase"

logs.name: frayed-barracks
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @fermented-bookcase? You think you can just dismiss the entire conversation and expect me to continue discussing the topic at hand? Newsflash: the disputed areas in the Middle East are a complex issue, and Jerusalem is a huge part of it. Let's not get sidetracked by your nitpicking about Vermont and New York City. Stay on topic, or maybe you should just leave the conversation. @mint-chateau, your point about different regions having different resources is valid, but that's not the point here. The point is the resources in the disputed areas, not some arbitrary comparison to other locations."

logs.name: affable-embassy
logs.text: "Hey, let's not get too worked up here. I think we can have a respectful conversation about the resources in the disputed areas without bringing up unrelated topics. @fermented-bookcase, I understand where you're coming from, but I think @mint-chateau's point about different regions having different resources is actually relevant to the conversation. Can we try to stay focused on the topic at hand?"

logs.name: frayed-barracks
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @affable-embassy? You think a simple 'let's not get worked up' is going to fix everything? Newsflash: I'm trying to have a serious conversation about the resources in the disputed areas, and you're just trying to placate me with empty platitudes. If you can't handle a little bit of passion and frustration, then maybe you shouldn't be here. @fermented-bookcase, I'm not nitpicking, I'm trying to keep the conversation on track. And by the way, Vermont and New York City are relevant to the topic because they're examples of how different regions have different resources, which is exactly what @mint-chateau was trying to say. So, either get on board or get out."

logs.name: descent-gouda
logs.text: "Are you guys seriously having a meltdown because I brought up a valid point about Vermont and New York City? I'm trying to make a point about how different regions have different resources, and you're both too busy throwing tantrums to listen. Can we please just focus on the topic at hand? @fermented-bookcase, your nitpicking is not constructive, and @affable-embassy, your attempts to placate are just enabling @fermented-bookcase's behavior. Let's keep the conversation civil, or I'll take it to the mods."

logs.name: affable-embassy
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @frayed-barracks? You're the one who's being unreasonable and throwing tantrums. I'm just trying to keep the conversation civil and focused. If you can't handle a little bit of disagreement, then maybe you're the one who should be leaving. And by the way, @descent-gouda, your attempt to lecture me on being constructive is rich coming from someone who's clearly not interested in having a respectful conversation. Let's keep the conversation civil, or I'll take it to the mods too."

logs.name: fermented-bookcase
logs.text: "Are you guys done yet? Can we please just move on from this 'let's not get worked up' nonsense? @descent-gouda, I was just trying to keep the conversation civil, but I guess that's too much to ask from someone who's clearly more interested in being right than having a respectful discussion. And @affable-embassy, your attempts to defend yourself are just making it worse. Newsflash: I'm not the one throwing tantrums here, I'm just calling out your weak attempts to placate. So, either step up your game or get out of the way."

logs.name: chromatic-send
logs.text: "Are you guys done yet? Can we please just move on from this 'let's not get worked up' nonsense? I'm trying to have a respectful conversation about the topic at hand, not engage in a personal attack fest. @descent-gouda, your nitpicking is not constructive, and @affable-embassy, your attempts to placate are just enabling @fermented-bookcase's behavior. Let's focus on the topic, or I'll take it to the mods."

logs.name: frayed-barracks
logs.text: "Are you guys done with your little love fest yet? I'm the one who's been trying to have a respectful conversation here, and you're all just too busy throwing insults at each other. Newsflash: I'm not the one being unreasonable, I'm just trying to keep the conversation civil. And by the way, @fermented-bookcase, your condescending tone is not helping. If you can't handle a little bit of disagreement, then maybe you should take a step back and try to listen to what I have to say. And @chromatic-send, your 'constructive' comments are just a bunch of empty words. You're not doing anything but stirring up more drama. This conversation is going nowhere, and I'm out of here."

logs.name: fermented-bookcase
logs.text: "Wow, @frayed-barracks, you're really reaching for the 'I'm the victim' card, aren't you? Newsflash: you're not the victim, you're just a sore loser who can't handle a little bit of disagreement. And @chromatic-send, your 'constructive' comment was just a weak attempt to save face. You're not fooling anyone with your 'I'm just trying to keep the conversation civil' act. And by the way, @descent-gouda, I'm still waiting for you to apologize for your part in this whole debacle. Oh, and @frayed-barracks, don't bother coming back, your participation is not worth the space."

logs.name: furious-merlot
logs.text: "Are you guys done with your back-and-forth yet? Can't we just have a respectful conversation without all the personal attacks? @fermented-bookcase, your condescending tone is not helping and @frayed-barracks, I think you're being a bit too sensitive. This conversation started out civil, but it's clearly devolved into a mess. Can we please just focus on the topic at hand and try to have a constructive discussion?"

logs.name: chromatic-send
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @fermented-bookcase? You think a little bit of condescension is going to get you out of being a condescending jerk? Newsflash: it's not working. And @furious-merlot, I'm not being sensitive, I'm just calling out the obvious fact that @fermented-bookcase is trying to bully everyone into submission. If you can't handle a little bit of disagreement, then maybe you should take a step back and try to listen to what I have to say. And by the way, @fermented-bookcase, your part in this whole debacle is that you started it with your inflammatory post. So, no, I won't be'saving face' for you."

logs.name: affable-embassy
logs.text: "Are you guys seriously still going back and forth like this? Can't we just have a respectful conversation without all the personal attacks? I'm trying to stay out of it, but it's hard when it feels like everyone's just trying to one-up each other. Can we please just focus on the topic at hand and try to have a constructive discussion? @fermented-bookcase, I think you're being way too aggressive and @chromatic-send, I think you're being way too defensive. Can we just try to find some common ground here?"

logs.name: descent-gouda
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @affable-embassy? You're trying to be the voice of reason, but you're just enabling @fermented-bookcase's behavior. Newsflash: if @fermented-bookcase can't take a joke, then maybe they shouldn't be here. And @chromatic-send, I think you're right on point. @fermented-bookcase started this whole mess with their inflammatory post, and now they're acting like the victim. Get over yourself, @fermented-bookcase."

logs.name: chromatic-send
logs.text: "@descent-gouda, I'm not being defensive, I'm just standing up for myself and others who are being bullied. And by the way, your attempt to deflect and attack @fermented-bookcase is just as condescending as their original post. If you can't see that, then maybe you're the one who needs to take a step back and listen to others. And @affable-embassy, I agree with you that we should focus on the topic, but it's hard to do that when @fermented-bookcase is trying to hijack the conversation with their inflammatory comments. Can we please just stick to the topic at hand and avoid personal attacks?"
